description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical bottle with a smooth, glossy surface and a gray cap. The body of the bottle is wrapped in a deep purple label featuring white text and branding, with detailed product information and instructions visible on the back and sides. The front of the bottle prominently displays the product name and key ingredients, while the back is densely covered with fine print, including usage directions, ingredients, and regulatory icons. The cap appears to be made of plastic and is likely a snap-on or screw-on type, providing a secure closure. The bottle is designed to dispense lotion, likely through a pump or squeeze mechanism under the cap. The overall appearance is clean and professional, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A tall, cylindrical lotion bottle with a glossy purple label, white text, and a gray plastic cap. The packaging is sleek and professional, featuring detailed product information.
description_view_0: The front view shows the product name, brand, and key information on a purple label with a gray cap.
description_view_1: The back view displays dense white text with instructions, ingredients, and regulatory icons on the label.
description_view_2: This angled view highlights the transition between the front and back label, showing both branding and detailed information.
description_view_3: The side view reveals additional product details and the edge of the front branding, with the cap and label clearly visible.
